.. _commentexpver:

commentexpver
=============

**inherit_from**: ['comment']

Summary
-------

+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|keyword                 |default                 |attribute               |value                   |
+========================+========================+========================+========================+
|**alpha**               |0.9                     |                        |                        |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |*alias*                 |alpha_channel           |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |*type*                  |float                   |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |*unique*                |True                    |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|**angle**               |30                      |                        |                        |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |*unique*                |True                    |

+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |*unique*                |True                    |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|**linecolor**           |black                   |                        |                        |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |*unique*                |True                    |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|**linewidth**           |0.5                     |                        |                        |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |*type*                  |float                   |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |*unique*                |True                    |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|**position**            |topshifted              |                        |                        |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |*unique*                |True                    |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |*validate*              |ValidateChoice          |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |                        |top                     |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |                        |bottom                  |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |                        |top_and_bottom          |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |                        |top_indented            |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |                        |bottom_indented         |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |                        |best_indented           |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |                        |top_angled              |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |                        |bottom_angled           |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |                        |best_angled             |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|**rank**                |100                     |                        |                        |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |*type*                  |int                     |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |*unique*                |True                    |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|**style**               |['-']                   |                        |                        |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
|                        |                        |*unique*                |True                    |
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+
+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+------------------------+

Keywords
--------

alpha
^^^^^

default: **0.9**

this is a percentage of opacity for the alpha channel, 0 is transparent, 1 is full color

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |alpha_channel                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|type                                             |float                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

angle
^^^^^

default: **30**

Determines the angle used to display angled text. The bigger the angle, the longer the text can be, but the more risks to cover the contents of the plot

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

color
^^^^^

default: **black**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

date_format
^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **%e %b**

If the date is displayed, this is the format for drawing it. You can get help on date formats by typing 'man strftime'

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

display
^^^^^^^

default: **line**

**display** is a list of items the user decides to display. If it is empty, nothing is shown. Add as many keywords as required.

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|validate                                         |ValidateChoice                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |line                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |expver                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |date                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

font
^^^^

default: **{'size': 'x-small'}**

the characteristics of the text to be drawn please see directive **plotfont**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|type                                             |plotfont                                         |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

linecolor
^^^^^^^^^

default: **black**

color of the vertical line if it is drawn

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

linewidth
^^^^^^^^^

default: **0.5**

width of the vertical line if it is drawn

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|type                                             |float                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

position
^^^^^^^^

default: **topshifted**

This determines where the text will go and how it will be organised. For 'top' and 'bottom' all the texts are drawn horizontally, they may overlap. For 'top_indented' and 'bottom_indented', the text is drawn horizontally, but if there is an overlap, the text is 'crenelled' or indented. For 'top_angled' and 'bottom_angled', the text is drawn at an angle (please see the keyword **angle**), this is the safest and most readable way of drawing text without overlaps. The text may cover the contents of the plot though, if this is the case, a good move is to set a negative **rank** to the comment, so that it is drawn before the contents of the plot. For 'best_angled' and 'best_indented', the application decideds whether the text should go at the top or at the bottom of the plot, depending on available space

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|validate                                         |ValidateChoice                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |top                                              |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |bottom                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |top_and_bottom                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |top_indented                                     |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |bottom_indented                                  |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |best_indented                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |top_angled                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |bottom_angled                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |best_angled                                      |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

rank
^^^^

default: **100**

The rank determines at which point of drawing this particular comment should be drawn. Negatives values mean before any curves are plotted, positive values mean mean after plotting the curves. The comments are plotted in the order of the rank so the user has control over the order in which graphical comments are drawn.

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|type                                             |int                                              |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

style
^^^^^

default: **-**

style used for drawing the line.

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

generated on 2012-11-04 20:07:41
